activity_id.description: Echoes the activity_id argument — the standalone activity was scheduled successfully.

run_id.description: Server-assigned run identifier. Use this in subsequent temporal_get_activity_result or temporal_describe_activity calls to disambiguate retries.

status.description: Always 'started' on success — the activity has been scheduled but is NOT awaited by this tool. Use temporal_get_activity_result to block on completion.
